notes.configSummaryThreshold: Token threshold for generating config summary. If config content (in bytes) exceeds this value, a summary will be generated via LLM to reduce token consumption. Set to 0 to always generate summary, or set to a very large value to never generate summary.
notes.example: For example, if config content is 250KB (250000 bytes) and threshold is 50000, a summary will be generated. If config content is 3KB (3000 bytes) and threshold is 5000, full config will be used without summary generation.
